query:
SELECT 
  name, 
  attractionType, 
  COUNT(*) as count,
  GROUP_CONCAT(id) as ids
FROM attraction_guides
GROUP BY name, attractionType
HAVING count > 1
ORDER BY count DESC
LIMIT 20;
